prompt: Complete the Secure Exam Scheduling & Notification Management System. The backend APIs and frontend foundation (auth, scheduling, roster, notification UI) are already built under repo/. Now implement the admin dashboards, review queue UIs, and polish end-to-end integration. ADMIN DASHBOARD PAGE (/admin/dashboard): Implement the dashboard stats view calling GET /dashboard/stats?termId=X with summary cards (Total Sessions, Upcoming Sessions, Total Students, Pending Reviews, Failed Jobs, Pending Anti-Cheat Flags), recent activity timeline, quick-action buttons, and term selector dropdown. USER MANAGEMENT PAGE (/admin/users): DataTable with columns (Username, Display Name, Roles, Status, Created At), filters (role dropdown, status dropdown, search), Create/Edit User dialogs with password strength meter, row actions (Edit, Delete soft, Unlock, Toggle Concurrent Sessions), PII masking toggle. JOB MONITOR PAGE (/admin/jobs): DataTable with status badges (colored), filters (jobType, status dropdowns), retry button for FAILED jobs, job detail modal with payload_json. AUDIT LOG PAGE (/admin/audit-logs): DataTable with IP Address column, expandable row for details_json, date range picker, CSV export. COMPLIANCE REVIEW QUEUE PAGE (/admin/compliance-reviews): Status filter tabs (Pending/Approved/Rejected), review detail page with content preview, target scope, approve/reject with comments and confirmation modal, badge count in sidebar. ANTI-CHEAT REVIEW QUEUE PAGE (/admin/anti-cheat): Status filter tabs, review detail with flag visualizations (ACTIVITY_BURST timeline, IDENTICAL_SUBMISSIONS side-by-side, ABNORMAL_SCORE_DELTA chart), CLEARED/CONFIRMED_FRAUD decision form, human review only. NOTIFICATION MANAGEMENT PAGE (/admin/notifications): Status filter tabs, Create flow (form, preview, draft, submit for review, publish), delivery status view with per-recipient tracking, manual retry for failed deliveries. VERSION HISTORY UI: Version list, compare mode with side-by-side diff, restore with confirmation. CAMPUS & ROOM MANAGEMENT PAGE: Campus list with expandable rooms, Add/Edit dialogs, capacity visualization. INTEGRATION & POLISH: Error handling with toast notifications, skeleton loaders, empty states, breadcrumbs, notification badge polling, auto-save indicator, session timeout, responsive design, keyboard navigation, i18n (zh-CN primary, en secondary).
